title: 1 Bed 1 Bath Apartment
description:
Cozy & Updated Basement Apartment for Rent in a 6-Plex

Beautifully upgraded basement apartment in a well-maintained 6-plex. This unit offers the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and low-maintenance living.

Features include:
   Upgraded Kitchen: Enjoy cooking in this kitchen featuring an island with marble countertops, new cabinetry, and wood floors.
   Bedroom: Relax in a cozy bedroom that comes with its own en-suite bathroom and vanity, providing the ultimate privacy and convenience.
   Low-Maintenance Living: This apartment is designed to be easy to care for, allowing you to enjoy a hassle-free lifestyle.
   6'x8' locked, personal storage unit in the garage. Perfect for bikes, tools, etc.
   Shared, coin-operated washer & dryer in building. 

Located in a desirable neighborhood with easy access to shops, restaurants, and public transport, this apartment is perfect for those looking for comfort and simplicity. Blocks away from Springville town square and 12 minutes to BYU. 

Available for move in April 1, 2026. 1 year lease. Hosting showings Sunday 3/1 11:00am.

Utilities are $175/month. This includes water, electric, gas, sewer, trash. Tenant is responsible for internet. 

No pets allowed. 

No smoking allowed on premises. 

Ample parking available.

We require good credit and income ~3x rent. Will perform background checks.

title: 2 Beds 1 Bath Apartment
description: 2 bedrooms and 1 bathroom. The living room offers ample space. Full bathroom. Each bedroom provides sufficient room for furniture and personal items. New carpet was just installed last week. The apartment is freshly painted. The property is smoke-free, ensuring a clean living environment. Additionally, there are washer and dryer hookups available for convenience. The exterior of the property is well-maintained, providing a welcoming appearance. No pets allowed.

title: 1 Bed 1 Bath Apartment
description:
This is a really great apartment and I have loved living here! Roommates are super chill and the Ward is great! I have 2 roommates right now, even though there are 4 rooms, so the whole apartment houses 4 people (including yourself). There is a hot tub, pool, gym, chill lobby area, and a great  BBQ place. 

The room itself is super big private room, the bed you see in the room is a queen sized bed. The sink in your room can be a little weird at first, but it actually makes brushing teeth, shaving, and any other hygiene practices easy. 

The living room and kitchen areas are normal and are big enough to host a game night or movie night. The only thing I have against this apartment is the shared fridge but its not that bad to share with 3 other people. 

Anyways, that is the apartment and I want to move out in April or May, because I am getting married in April. So please help a brother out haha, and if you have any questions I am really good at responding to DMs, So just reply.

title: Men’s Apartment (2 Contracts)
description:
PRO-RATED Men’s Shared room available in a house right next to BYU campus (2 spots available). Rent will be $485 utilities included! Available APRIL 26-AUGUST 17. FREE GUARANTEED PARKING behind house
Pros:
- Large living areas and kitchen (2 fridges)
- FREE guaranteed parking behind house
- In unit laundry
- Garage with loft for movies
- Backyard with picnic tables and fire pit
- Lots of extra storage space
- Lots of closet space (walk in closet)
- On University Avenue close to the Brick Oven
Con:
- One bathroom (surprisingly not a big deal especially in the summer!)

title: 2 Beds 1 Bath Apartment
description:
No Application Fee. This is a 1-year lease, NO subletting.

OPEN HOUSE Thursday, March 5, 2026 6:30-7:30pm. 

Upper-right unit in a well-kept fourplex in Orem. It's in a great area situated between Target and University Place in Orem. The apartment is unfurnished and comes VERY CLEAN with covered parking, separate storage in carport, large yard area with shade trees, Washer/Dryer (hook-ups only), heating and Central AC, and upgraded closet spaces. The owners live less than 2 miles away and are very responsive. Renter pays for gas, electric, and internet. (This unit is wired for Utopia internet if that is your choice)
These are older pictures, the unit has new carpet and paint.

No smoking/vaping or pets*.

I will call former landlords/employers for recommendation and income verification.

Deposit due at signing ($1150)
1st month's rent due at move in ($1150)

Available for move-in approximately April 15, 2026

We will be accepting applications up through the open house on March 5. Please message me your email address if you'd like an application. I will need an application for each person 18 or older.

Due to the high volume of interest, I will respond to messages once a day around 8-9 pm each day.

*Service animals, like guide dogs, must be trained to assist with specific tasks. For ESAs, we require a current, formal letter from a licensed mental health professional. This letter should explain the need for an emotional support animal.

title: 1 Bed 1 Bath Apartment
description: Walk right across the street to BYU Campus.  Available to move in today and located at 915 N 150 E in Provo. This clean & updated Halladay Living apartment features a floor plan with the family room, dining area and kitchen all open to each other. The kitchen comes with a fridge, dishwasher, oven and disposal. The kitchen is great for cooking with plenty of cupboards for storage, counter space and a large breakfast bar. The bathroom is an optimally designed as the vanity and sink area is separate from the shower/toilet room. The bedroom has double closets and an additional storage closet is located off the hallway adjacent to the bedroom.  There is a barbecue area in the court yard and coin-operated laundry room in the building.  An assigned covered parking spots is $50 monthly or an assigned uncovered parking spots is $40 monthly. Monthly rent is $1080. Resident pays for renters insurance and their electricity use along with $60 monthly for their gas, water, sewer, and garbage use. Residents pay for Google Fiber  high speed Internet $60 monthly. The deposit is $1250 and the lease initiation of $250. A 4  to 6 month lease is available. With the option to renew for another year available afterwards.  No Pets and No Smoking in or on apartment premise.  If interested in seeing and applying for the apartment please message me.
